user_query: On childs first day, add cinnamon toast crunch for breakfast

fields.name: Cinnamon Toast Crunch (serving)
fields.short_description: A crunchy, cinnamon-sugar swept cereal that's a kid-favorite and quick to serve for a busy morning.
fields.serving_suggestion: Pour one serving of Cinnamon Toast Crunch into a bowl and top with cold milk (dairy or plant-based). Add sliced banana or berries for extra fruit and nutrients if desired.
fields.nutrition_note: Provides quick carbohydrates for energy and is palatable for children; pairing with milk and fruit adds protein, calcium, and fiber to balance the meal. Watch portion size and frequency due to added sugars.

result.reasoning: User requested adding Cinnamon Toast Crunch to the child's Day 1 breakfast. Day 1 breakfast already contains one Meal item, so append this POI as an additional breakfast option (position -1). The POI includes serving suggestion and nutrition note to fit the meal-planning context.
